reach_why: Recasts familiar limits of self-evaluation, novelty metrics, and forgetting; does not open clearly unprecedented explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links evaluator stability, lexical novelty failure, and memory-forgetting tradeoffs into one skeptical framework.
falsifiable_why: Claims about proxy failure and forgetting tradeoffs are testable; evaluator-stability critique remains partly conceptual.
explanation: Self-improvement stalls when novelty proxies fail, forgetting is risky, and evaluator reliability lacks justification.
